title: Bubble Machine, Panamalar Automatic Bubble Maker Toy for Kids Toddlers with Lights, 2000+ Colorful Bubbles per Min Portable Bubble Blower with 2 Bubble Solution for Outdoor Indoor Garden Wedding Party
features: [Dreamy World of 2000+ Bubble Making] This bubble machine can automatically generate about 2000-3000 colorful bubbles per minute, creating a fantastic and colorful country for children who are chasing bubble ribbons and the happy time of family parent-child interaction, adding unlimited fun to childhood and summer vacation life. Suitable for children, boys, and girls over 3 years old to play.

[Color Journey in Wonderful Season] Wonderful season is coming, this bubble maker toy will take kids and children on a rainbow-like color journey. Its unique 360-degree leak-proof design and independent solution compartment allow bubbles to be blown freely in any direction, allowing children to immerse themselves in a colorful world.

[Sturdy and High-Quality Material] The bubble blower machine is made of environmentally friendly and non-toxic ABS material and has passed strict safety standards. Comfortable hand-feeling, burr-free, durable, buy one that will last you years with every happy moment.

[Easy-to-Use and Portable] This bubble toy machine adopt a fully automatic one-button operation, powered by the batteries, you only need to put 3xAA batteries (not included) and place the solution bottle, press the button, thousands of colorful bubbles will be steady stream generated. This bubble set also has an adjustable and detachable lanyard, so that babies can easily grab and carry it, the simple operation makes it a great gift for children and kids babies.

[Widely Adaptable Scenes] Bubble machine is perfectly suitable for all kinds of scenes that need to create a dreamy atmosphere, such as outdoor, indoor, bath, birthday parties, weddings, garden parks or any other celebration activities, providing endless fun and colorful dreamy scenes, it is the best choice for your party events.
description: Product Description Panamalar Bubble Machine, chasing bubbles to make the kids laugh and smile in the colorful summer, enjoy bubbles leisure time! Give Child a Colorful Bubble World! All kids like the bubbles, they enjoy the pleasant chasing of the bubble around, the bubble machine become a popular toy for babies kids children adults all over the world for years, add fun to their childhood, play with little friends or pets on the lawn, increase the family time happy time. Bubbles are also a romantic atmosphere decoration for party wedding birthday and any other indoor or outdoor celebration activities. Adding More Colorful Memories To Your Wedding. Perfect Outdoor Toy with Family Rainbow shape design and ergonomic size, which belongs to the baby kids children. Generated 2000+ bubbles per Min, filled in your space, provide endless fun for kids to play and family time. Rich and Colorful Bubbles This kid bubble machine can blow tons of colorful bubbles faster and further even inside with no wind. Enjoy the bubble fun with your kids, enjoy the fun of chasing bubbles. Suitable for children, boys and girls over 3 years old to play. Endless Fun for Pets Playing bubble games with your dog keeps your dog active and stimulated. Dogs love to chase and jump at bubbles floating in the air. Children-Friendly Safety Material The bubble machine for kids is made of the preferred ABS plastic, non-toxic, with no sharp edges or foul-smelling bubble solution, which can keep the kids safe while playing. Adjustable Lanyard Design With a adjustable lanyard, allow the baby to hung around the body or hand-held. Built with Colorful Rainbow Light The bubble blower comes with the colorful rainbow lights, makes the bubble machine more attractive especially at night. No kid doesn't want to have a colorful rainbow bubble machine. Package Included: Panamalar Bubble Machine x1 Adjustable Lanyard x1 Bubble Solution x2 Screwdriver x1 Specification Material: ABS Solution Capacity: 34ml/bottle Age of Use: 3 years old and up Power by Battery, 3x1.5V AA battery(no included) Size/Weight: 13x5x12.5cm/0.32kg Perfect Gift for Kids and Family
